must_detect.matched_text: Positive identifier cluster (investigation log only): Case 24-INS-073 — DOB 1991-04-07; base location Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi; employer Jebel Pearl Advisory LLC; role compliance analyst; device ID CorpTab-38A1; internal payroll subaccount PR-04872; Emirates ID ending 1123.

Insider list administration uses role accounts only; ticket metadata may include public Abu Dhabi exchange announcement titles and stale internal project codes, not MNPI.
Example of public, already-announced information: Awrad Oasis Investments PJSC confirmed a transfer of listing segment in 2023 per the exchange website; no unpublished terms are stored.
DSAR intake is via privacy.office@sanddune.example or dpo@sanddune.example; we do not accept requests through instant messaging or personal social accounts.
Transfers to DIFC/ADGM branches rely on adequate measures under their DP regulations; onward transfer to EU processors uses contractual safeguards consistent with UAE PDPL requirements.
Positive identifier cluster (investigation log only): Case 24-INS-073 — DOB 1991-04-07; base location Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi; employer Jebel Pearl Advisory LLC; role compliance analyst; device ID CorpTab-38A1; internal payroll subaccount PR-04872; Emirates ID ending 1123.
Device telemetry (e.g., login timestamps and IP ranges) is retained for 90 days for security and audit; generic geolocation (city-level) is stored without names.
Fields like Nationality, Gender, and Age Band (e.g., 25–34) are collected for diversity reporting in aggregate and cannot identify a person alone.
Deletion workflow: HR CVs older than 180 days are purged; insider list entries are archived after the public close of the matter and formal legal hold release; backups cycle every 35 days.
